Thanks for the pull request! Please fill out the sections below so reviewers
have the context they need. PRs are squash-merged and require at least one
approval from a CODEOWNERS member.
-->

## Description

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Related issue(s)

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## How has this been tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and the platform(s): Android, iOS, macOS,
Linux, Windows. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `dart analyze` is clean and `flutter test` passes
- [ ] New source files carry the Apache-2.0 SPDX header
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` and relevant docs are updated
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
